figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of the proposed PACD-Net architecture.
Figure 3: The Architecture of the Swin-CRB backbone in PACD-Net.

Table 1: Effect of teacher-view effective observation ratio (αT) on model performance under a fixed student-view constraint. The student-view effective observation ratio (αS) is fixed at 3%, while αT is varied.
Table 2: Impact of teacher and student view configurations on TR prediction performance.

Table 3: Model validation and ablation study of the PACD-Net framework. Performance is evaluated using overall regression metrics and class-wise MAE for TAR, TIR, and TBR. MVC refers to multi-view contrastive learning.
Figure 4: Scatter plots comparing predicted and ground truth glycemic metrics for different ablation variants.
Figure 5: Predicted vs. ground-truth AGP glycemic metric scatter plots for baseline, DPA model, and our method.
